settings.name: Plot number of locations per day
Add battery voltage to previous plot
Column name of battery voltage in the data set
settings.description: Provide the exact name of the column containing the battery voltage. If unsure of attribute names or spelling, please run the first App in your workflow and check the 'event_attributes' in the 'App Output Details' (green 'i'). For definitions of Movebank attributes please refer to the Movebank Attribute Dictionary (https://www.movebank.org/cms/movebank-content/movebank-attribute-dictionary).

settings.name: Units to calculate fix rate
settings.description: Choose units to calculate the fix rate

settings.name: Additional attributes to plot as lines
settings.description: Provide the exact names of the data attributes that you want to plot (must be comma-separated! and without quotes). If unsure of attribute names or spelling, please run the first App in your workflow and check the 'event_attributes' in the 'App Output Details' (green 'i'). For definitions of Movebank attributes please refer to the Movebank Attribute Dictionary (https://www.movebank.org/cms/movebank-content/movebank-attribute-dictionary).

settings.name: Additional attributes to plot as a boxplot per day
settings.description: Provide the exact names of the data attributes that you want to plot (must be comma-separated! and without quotes). If unsure of attribute names or spelling, please run the first App in your workflow and check the 'event_attributes' in the 'App Output Details' (green 'i'). For definitions of Movebank attributes please refer to the Movebank Attribute Dictionary (https://www.movebank.org/cms/movebank-content/movebank-attribute-dictionary).
